title: How One Hour Without the Phone Changes the Kind of Man You're Becoming
caption:
Your phone is training you. The question is for what.

This is your generation's battle — the one your grandfather never had to fight. And most men aren't even treating it like one. They call it a habit. They schedule a detox. Then they're back.

Here's what it actually takes:

The phone doesn't just take time — it reshapes what you crave, how long you can sit with something hard, how quiet you can tolerate. Forty-five minutes on the feed trains you to quit at forty-five seconds of prayer.

"I will not be dominated by anything." — 1 Corinthians 6:12. Not a cleanse. A war.

One hour. Phone face-down. Start there.

Save this. Share it with a brother who keeps saying he'll deal with it later.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #phonefreedom #godlymen #manofgod #selfcontrol #christianity #theethosapp
theme: He fights the phone. This generation's battle.
